title: London Overground Class 345/710
description: A Class 345 in London Overground livery, complete with interior, for Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![Class 345 in LO Livery stopped at a platform, doors open](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16547dc13be2c0ea21d73c73b52705ce592c8de9_0.webp)

A Class 345, in London Overground livery, for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod!

Complete with 710-spec exterior and interior finishes, the LO 345 will make you feel like you're cruising cross-city London in no time!
